summary: This document is a Record of Processing Activities (ROPA) outlining KeepMeCompany's GDPR compliance framework. It details data collection methods via AI phone agents, security measures like AES-256 encryption, and third-party processor agreements. The file specifies retention policies, legal bases for processing, and confirms all data remains within the UK/EU.
